title: Chart Projector
subtitle: Overlay Yesterday's Price Action as a Ghost Chart onto Today
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)

data_requirements.name: today_intraday_bars
data_requirements.note: Only timestamps needed — used to know where to plot ghost candles on x-axis

data_requirements.name: yesterday_daily_bar
data_requirements.note: Used to draw horizontal S/R lines at prev day High and Low

data_requirements.name: timeframe_seconds
data_requirements.note: Used to calculate the x-width of each ghost candle body rectangle

ghost_color.description: Color of all ghost elements. Use alpha for transparency.

show_high_low.description: Draw horizontal lines at prev day High and Low

shift_bars.description: Shift ghost left(-) or right(+) by N bars. Used to correct broker timezone offset.

lookback_days.description: IMPROVEMENT on original: how many days back to ghost. Original was hardcoded to 1.

steps.name: identify_session_boundaries
steps.description: Get yesterday's start/end and today's start/end from SessionManager

steps.name: fetch_yesterday_bars
steps.description: Pull all intraday bars for yesterday on the active timeframe

steps.name: fetch_today_bars
steps.description: Pull today's bar timestamps — only time field needed

steps.name: project_ghost_bars
steps.description: For each today bar position, map it to a yesterday bar using modulo cycling. Combine today's time with yesterday's OHLC.
steps.key_logic: ghost_bars[i].time = today_bars[i].time + shift_bars * timeframe_seconds | ghost_bars[i].ohlc = yesterday_bars[i % len(yesterday_bars)].ohlc

steps.name: render_ghost_candles
steps.description: Draw each ghost bar as a wick line (low to high) and a body rectangle (open to close)

steps.name: render_high_low_lines
steps.description: Draw full-width horizontal lines at yesterday's daily High and Low with price labels

components_to_build.name: SessionManager
components_to_build.note: Must handle weekend gaps, holidays, partial sessions, timezone normalisation

components_to_build.name: ToolConfig
components_to_build.note: Shared config object extended per tool. Part 1 defines the base fields.

keep: Ghost overlay concept — proven price action technique
Yesterday H/L horizontal lines — most valuable output
Modulo cycling logic — handles short/irregular sessions cleanly
All 6 config parameters adapted to our schema
discard: All MQL5 ObjectCreate / OBJ_TREND / OBJ_HLINE rendering calls
iBarShift, iTime, iOpen, iHigh, iLow, iClose data API calls
improve: Add alpha/opacity support — original uses solid grey, no transparency
Add live refresh on bar close — original runs once only
Extend lookback to configurable N days — original hardcoded to 1
Add price labels to H/L lines — original draws unlabelled lines
Handle broker timezone offsets at data layer — original uses ShiftBars workaround

article_figures.title: Comparing Price Action (Sept 19 vs 20)
article_figures.insight: Shows the PROBLEM — manual S/R lines are subjective. Tool automates this.

article_figures.title: MetaEditor New Script Window
article_figures.insight: Confirms tool type: Script (runs once, not live indicator)

article_figures.title: Script Input Dialog
article_figures.insight: Shows all 6 configurable parameters as presented to user

article_figures.title: Animated Chart Projection Result
article_figures.insight: Ghost candles visible behind today's price. Price clearly respects prev H/L lines.

article_figures.title: Static Chart Projection Result
article_figures.insight: Still frame showing ghost bars distinct from live candles. Grey dotted style works well.
